title: Riku vs Kuu
overview: Nekoma's first is none other than Fukuroudani High School. The two teams are linked by a long rivalry, which is why some players on both sides are quite tense. A match between equal opponents begins.

title: Ball no Michi
overview: The match between Nekoma and Nohebi Academy continues with Nekoma now short their starting libero. As first-year Shibayama takes the court for the duration of the match, Nohebi begins to show their true colors.
